build.buildCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-vnpy.txt && python -c "from pathlib import Path; p=Path('config/trading_orb/symbols.txt'); assert p.is_file(); from orb.vnpy.bootstrap import ensure_vnpy_path; ensure_vnpy_path(); import vnpy_sqlite; from vnpy.event import EventEngine; print('vnpy ok', len(p.read_text().splitlines()))"
